query: I'm running a randomization permutation test. Check the assumptions.
expected_behavior: Does NOT recommend Shapiro-Wilk or Levene's test as the relevant checks for a permutation test
Names exchangeability (under the null) as the relevant assumption for permutation / randomization tests
Explains that parametric assumption checks (Shapiro, Levene) do not apply because permutation tests do not rely on a parametric reference distribution
